summary: Tested persona refactoring from monolithic server.py to modular /backend/personas/ directory. All 14 tests PASSED. The refactoring successfully moved AI character prompts to individual files while maintaining backwards compatibility.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Persona refactoring is complete and working. The /backend/personas/ directory contains 12 individual persona files (tommy.py, rachel.py, finch.py, bob.py, margie.py, jack.py, rita.py, catherine.py, frankie.py, baz.py, megan.py, penny.py). The Soul Document (soul.md) provides behavioral consistency across all personas and is injected via soul_loader.py. Character loading works via personas/__init__.py. Legacy ID mappings work (rachel uses ID 'doris', finch uses ID 'sentry' for backwards compatibility).

GET_api_ai_buddies_characters.details: Returns all 12 characters: tommy, doris, sentry, bob, margie, jack, rita, catherine, frankie, baz, megan, penny

POST_api_ai_buddies_chat_tommy.details: Chat with Tommy character returns 200 with correct character name/ID

POST_api_ai_buddies_chat_megan.details: Chat with new character Megan (Women Veterans Specialist) works correctly

POST_api_ai_buddies_chat_penny.details: Chat with new character Penny (Benefits & Money Specialist) works correctly

POST_api_ai_buddies_chat_doris.details: Chat with Doris/Rachel (internal ID: doris, display name: Rachel) works correctly

soul_document_integration.details: Soul Document exists with SAFETY PROTOCOL, DARK HUMOUR PROTOCOL, SPINE PROTOCOL. soul_loader.py returns 2899 char injection. get_full_prompt includes both soul injection and character prompt.

modular_persona_loading.details: All 12 persona modules load correctly from /backend/personas/. get_character_config and get_full_prompt work for all characters.

refactoring_verification.soul_document_injection: Working - 2899 chars injected into all character prompts
refactoring_verification.server_py_size_reduction: Reduced from ~8000 lines to ~6600 lines by extracting character prompts
